title: agropyron littorale
intro: Agropyron littorale, also known as beach wildrye, is a type of grass that grows in coastal areas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Agropyron littorale include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote digestive well-being. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including colds, fever, and skin conditions.
